message.content:
@startuml
actor Teams as Actor
interface API as API
interface BuildService as BuildService
interface CommandParser as CommandParser
interface BuildCommand as BuildCommand
interface BuildSystem as BuildSystem
interface BuildFactory as BuildFactory
database BuildDb as BuildDb
interface BuildMonitor as BuildMonitor
interface NotificationService as NotificationService
database NotificationDb as NotificationDb

Actor "Teams" as A
API "API" as B
BuildService "BuildService" as C
CommandParser "CommandParser" as D
BuildCommand "BuildCommand" as E
BuildSystem "BuildSystem" as F
BuildFactory "BuildFactory" as G
BuildDb "BuildDb" as H
BuildMonitor "BuildMonitor" as I
NotificationService "NotificationService" as J
NotificationDb "NotificationDb" as K

A -> B : /api/messages
B -> C : ProcessCommandAsync
C -> D : ParseCommand
D -> C : BuildCommand
C -> E : Execute
E -> F : CreateBuildAsync
F -> G : CreateBuildAsync
G -> H : Save build
H -> F : Build
F -> I : AddBuildAsync
I -> J : AddBuildAsync
J -> K : Save notification
K -> E : Build
E -> C : AddNotificationAsync
C -> A : Build

@enduml
